mapper.select: select count(1) from mom_pbom where pbom_code = #{pbomCode} and pbom_id != #{pbomId}
mapper.insert: insert into mom_pbom(pbom_code, pbom_name, product_id, version, status, remark, create_by, create_time) values(#{pbomCode}, #{pbomName}, #{productId}, #{version}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: delete from mom_pbom where pbom_id in #{pbomId}
mapper.select: select i.item_id itemId, i.pbom_id pbomId, i.parent_item_id parentItemId, i.material_id materialId, m.material_code materialCode, m.material_name materialName, m.spec_model specModel, m.unit, i.resource_id resourceId, r.resource_code resourceCode, r.resource_name resourceName, i.item_seq itemSeq, i.quantity, i.status, i.remark from mom_pbom_item i left join mom_material m on i.material_id = m.material_id left join mom_resource r on i.resource_id = r.resource_id where i.pbom_id = #{pbomId} order by i.parent_item_id, i.item_seq, i.item_id
mapper.insert: insert into mom_pbom_item(pbom_id, parent_item_id, material_id, resource_id, item_seq, quantity, status, remark, create_by, create_time) values(#{pbomId}, #{parentItemId}, #{materialId}, #{resourceId}, #{itemSeq}, #{quantity}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: delete from mom_pbom_item where item_id in #{itemId}
delete from mom_pbom_item where pbom_id in #{pbomId}
mapper.select: select count(1) from mom_tray where tray_code = #{trayCode} and tray_id != #{trayId}
mapper.insert: insert into mom_tray(tray_code, tray_name, tray_type, resource_id, status, remark, create_by, create_time) values(#{trayCode}, #{trayName}, #{trayType}, #{resourceId}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: delete from mom_tray where tray_id in #{trayId}
mapper.select: select i.item_id itemId, i.tray_id trayId, i.material_id materialId, m.material_code materialCode, m.material_name materialName, i.location_code locationCode, i.quantity, i.status, i.remark from mom_tray_item i left join mom_material m on i.material_id = m.material_id where i.tray_id = #{trayId} order by i.location_code, i.item_id
mapper.insert: insert into mom_tray_item(tray_id, material_id, location_code, quantity, status, remark, create_by, create_time) values(#{trayId}, #{materialId}, #{locationCode}, #{quantity}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: delete from mom_tray_item where item_id in #{itemId}
delete from mom_tray_item where tray_id in #{trayId}
mapper.select: select count(1) from mom_device_category where category_code = #{categoryCode} and category_id != #{categoryId}
mapper.insert: insert into mom_device_category(category_code, category_name, device_type, status, remark, create_by, create_time) values(#{categoryCode}, #{categoryName}, #{deviceType}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: delete from mom_device_category where category_id in #{categoryId}
mapper.select: select d.device_id deviceId, d.device_code deviceCode, d.device_name deviceName, d.category_id categoryId, c.category_name categoryName, c.device_type deviceType, d.resource_id resourceId, r.resource_name resourceName, d.ip_address ipAddress, d.port, d.status, d.runtime_data runtimeData, d.last_connect_time lastConnectTime, d.remark from mom_device d left join mom_device_category c on d.category_id = c.category_id left join mom_resource r on d.resource_id = r.resource_id where d.device_id = #{deviceId}
select count(1) from mom_device where device_code = #{deviceCode} and device_id != #{deviceId}
mapper.insert: insert into mom_device(device_code, device_name, category_id, resource_id, ip_address, port, status, remark, create_by, create_time) values(#{deviceCode}, #{deviceName}, #{categoryId}, #{resourceId}, #{ipAddress}, #{port}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: delete from mom_device where device_id in #{deviceId}
mapper.select:
select s.schedule_id scheduleId, s.schedule_code scheduleCode, s.work_order_id workOrderId, w.work_order_code workOrderCode, p.product_code productCode, p.product_name productName, s.operation_id operationId, o.operation_code operationCode, o.operation_name operationName, s.resource_id resourceId, r.resource_code resourceCode, r.resource_name resourceName, s.plan_start_time planStartTime, s.plan_end_time planEndTime, s.plan_qty planQty, s.reported_qty reportedQty, s.status from mom_schedule s left join mom_work_order w on s.work_order_id = w.work_order_id left join ( select material_id product_id, material_code product_code, material_name product_name from mom_material where (material_type = 'product' or category_id in (select category_id from mom_material_category where category_code = 'FG' or category_name = '成品')) ) p on w.product_id = p.product_id left join mom_operation o on s.operation_id = o.operation_id left join mom_resource r on s.resource_id = r.resource_id
and s.status in ('released', 'running') and s.resource_id = #{resourceId}
and (s.schedule_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or w.work_order_code like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%') or p.product_name like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
order by s.plan_start_time, s.schedule_id

select * from ( select s.schedule_id scheduleId, s.schedule_code scheduleCode, s.work_order_id workOrderId, w.work_order_code workOrderCode, p.product_code productCode, p.product_name productName, w.plan_qty workOrderPlanQty, w.completed_qty completedQty, s.operation_id operationId, o.operation_code operationCode, o.operation_name operationName, s.resource_id resourceId, r.resource_code resourceCode, r.resource_name resourceName, s.plan_start_time planStartTime, s.plan_end_time planEndTime, s.plan_qty planQty, s.reported_qty reportedQty, s.status from mom_schedule s left join mom_work_order w on s.work_order_id = w.work_order_id left join ( select material_id product_id, material_code product_code, material_name product_name from mom_material where (material_type = 'product' or category_id in (select category_id from mom_material_category where category_code = 'FG' or category_name = '成品')) ) p on w.product_id = p.product_id left join mom_operation o on s.operation_id = o.operation_id left join mom_resource r on s.resource_id = r.resource_id ) x where x.scheduleId = #{scheduleId}

select distinct o.operation_id operationId, o.operation_code operationCode, o.operation_name operationName, o.operation_seq operationSeq from mom_schedule s join mom_work_order w on s.work_order_id = w.work_order_id join mom_operation o on w.routing_id = o.routing_id where s.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} and o.status = '0' order by o.operation_seq

select st.step_id stepId, st.operation_id operationId, st.step_code stepCode, st.step_name stepName, st.step_seq stepSeq, st.standard_minutes standardMinutes, st.is_report_point isReportPoint, st.step_desc stepDesc, st.operation_type operationType, st.screw_check_count screwCheckCount, st.vision_program visionProgram, st.guide_task_id guideTaskId, st.image_url imageUrl from mom_schedule s join mom_work_order w on s.work_order_id = w.work_order_id join mom_operation o on w.routing_id = o.routing_id join mom_work_step st on o.operation_id = st.operation_id where s.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} and o.status = '0' and st.status = '0' order by o.operation_seq, st.step_seq

select d.device_id deviceId, d.device_code deviceCode, d.device_name deviceName, c.device_type deviceType, d.status, d.runtime_data runtimeData from mom_schedule s join mom_device d on s.resource_id = d.resource_id left join mom_device_category c on d.category_id = c.category_id where s.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} order by d.device_id

select i.item_id itemId, i.material_id materialId, m.material_code materialCode, m.material_name materialName, m.spec_model specModel, m.unit, i.quantity, i.issue_type issueType, i.operation_id operationId, i.step_id stepId from mom_schedule s join mom_work_order w on s.work_order_id = w.work_order_id join mom_mbom_item i on w.mbom_id = i.mbom_id left join mom_material m on i.material_id = m.material_id where s.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} order by i.item_seq, i.item_id

select child.resource_id resourceId, child.resource_code resourceCode, child.resource_name resourceName from mom_schedule s join mom_resource child on child.parent_id = s.resource_id where s.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} and child.resource_type = 'location' and child.status = '0' order by child.resource_code

select b.binding_id bindingId, b.schedule_id scheduleId, b.material_id materialId, m.material_code materialCode, m.material_name materialName, b.resource_id resourceId, r.resource_name resourceName, b.box_code boxCode, b.binding_type bindingType, b.quantity, b.status, b.create_time createTime, b.remark from mom_material_binding b left join mom_material m on b.material_id = m.material_id left join mom_resource r on b.resource_id = r.resource_id where b.schedule_id = #{scheduleId} order by b.binding_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into mom_material_binding(schedule_id, material_id, resource_id, box_code, binding_type, quantity, status, remark, create_by, create_time) values(#{scheduleId}, #{materialId}, #{resourceId}, #{boxCode}, #{bindingType}, #{quantity}, 'bound', #{remark}, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.delete: delete from mom_material_binding where binding_id in #{bindingId}
mapper.insert: insert into mom_duty_log(user_name, rfid_card, resource_id, duty_type, status, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{userName}, #{rfidCard}, #{resourceId}, #{dutyType}, #{status}, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{remark})

insert into mom_production_trace(work_order_id, schedule_id, operation_id, step_id, resource_id, material_id, device_id, serial_no, trace_type, event_name, operator_name, result, event_data, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{workOrderId}, #{scheduleId}, #{operationId}, #{stepId}, #{resourceId}, #{materialId}, #{deviceId}, #{serialNo}, #{traceType}, #{eventName}, #{operatorName}, #{result}, #{eventData}, #{createBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, #{remark})
mapper.select:
select t.trace_id traceId, t.work_order_id workOrderId, w.work_order_code workOrderCode, t.schedule_id scheduleId, t.operation_id operationId, o.operation_name operationName, t.step_id stepId, st.step_name stepName, t.resource_id resourceId, r.resource_name resourceName, t.material_id materialId, m.material_name materialName, t.device_id deviceId, d.device_name deviceName, t.serial_no serialNo, t.trace_type traceType, t.event_name eventName, t.operator_name operatorName, t.result, t.event_data eventData, t.create_time createTime, t.remark from mom_production_trace t left join mom_work_order w on t.work_order_id = w.work_order_id left join mom_operation o on t.operation_id = o.operation_id left join mom_work_step st on t.step_id = st.step_id left join mom_resource r on t.resource_id = r.resource_id left join mom_material m on t.material_id = m.material_id left join mom_device d on t.device_id = d.device_id
and t.work_order_id = #{workOrderId} and t.serial_no like concat('%', #{serialNo}, '%') and t.trace_type = #{traceType} and t.operator_name like concat('%', #{operatorName}, '%')
order by t.trace_id desc

select trace_id traceId, serial_no serialNo, trace_type traceType, event_name eventName, operator_name operatorName, result, event_data eventData, create_time createTime, remark from mom_production_trace where serial_no = #{serialNo} order by trace_id
select user_id userId, user_name userName, nick_name nickName, rfid_card rfidCard from sys_user where rfid_card = #{rfidCard} and status = '0' and del_flag = '0'
